// Curve A: raw Frobenius L-polynomials over Q(sqrt(5)), good primes p != 11
// rows: <N(p), rational p, rid, [c0,c1,c2,c3,c4]>;  L_p(T)=sum c_i T^i.
// rid = red(sqrt5) mod p (0..p-1) for split p; -1 if inert.
